name: node-babel7
title: node-babel7
summary: Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript
description:
Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript
Babel is a JavaScript compiler to use next generation JavaScript, today.
.
ES2015 and beyond: Babel has support for the latest version of JavaScript
through syntax transformers. These plugins allow you to use new syntax, right
now without waiting for browser support.

commands.name: babeljs-7
commands.description: The compiler for writing next generation JavaScript

commands.name: babeljs-7-node
commands.description: CLI that works exactly the same as the Node.js CLI, with the added benefit of compiling with Babel presets and plugins before running it

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use babeljs-7 because Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use babeljs-7 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair babeljs-7 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `babeljs-7 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install node-babel7. Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Babel compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: babel.js - The compiler for writing next generation JavaScript.
